layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one transaction per column (4 columns), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Security Name; Ticker; Transaction; Amount of Transaction A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Transaction; Capital Gain; Transaction Date). Selections are black-filled cells. The 'SP, DC, JT' row and the 'Transaction' row are continuous black bands across all four columns (no letters visible). Amount fills: B (cols 1-2), G (col 3), D (col 4). Type of Transaction: Purchase band spans cols 1-2, Partial Sale band spans cols 3-4. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'.
free_text: Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year
